name: Hunyuan3D 2 Full (Mesh + Texture)
description: Generates a textured 3D mesh from an image using Hunyuan3D-2mini for shape and Hunyuan3D-Paint for texture. Runs entirely locally on your GPU.
author: community

nodes.name: Generate Mesh
nodes.description: Generates a 3D mesh from an image using Hunyuan3D-2mini (shape only, no texture).

nodes.name: Texture Mesh
nodes.description: Applies a texture to an existing mesh using Hunyuan3D-Paint. Connect both the original image and the mesh.
